content: In 2022, a Russian whale researcher made a remarkable discovery on Bering Island off Russia s Pacific coast  a severed killer whale fin marked with the teeth of another killer whale. In 2024, it happened again. The two finds were two kilometers apart.

metadata.feedTitle: Phys.org - latest science and technology news stories
metadata.summary: In 2022, a Russian whale researcher made a remarkable discovery on Bering Island off Russia s Pacific coast  a severed killer whale fin marked with the teeth of another killer whale
